Hello I am a potato

Staff

Grayson Dazo-Kennoy

Founder

Grayson Dazo-Kennoy

Founder

Grayson is a game designer based out of Seattle, as well as the founder of Sunshower.

Their earliest foray into game design was when they were a kid making notebooks full of activities for the neighborhood to enjoy. These days, Grayson can be found weeping at their desk when their code stops working.

Class

Mime

Suzanne Dazo-Kennoy

Producer

Suzanne Dazo-Kennoy

Producer

Suzanne is a lover of crafts, VR, electronics, computing, CSEd, and Human-Computer Interaction.

No problem is safe from Suzanne. Whether it’s a visual illusion or a codebase that’s never known a comment, Suzanne thrives on solving puzzles and figuring out how stuff works with laser focus.

She also makes great lumpia.

Class

Toccata is a cat.
